AI employees
that scale
your business.
landing.heroDescription: Autonomous AI agents for support, sales & operations — on WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack and 10+ channels. Built for teams. Live in 60 seconds.

landing.channelsDescription: Deploy once, reach everywhere. Your agents respond on WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, and 9 more channels simultaneously.
landing.channelsList: WhatsApp / Telegram / Discord / Slack / Signal / iMessage / MS Teams / Google Chat / Mattermost / LINE / Feishu / Matrix
landing.builtForTitle: Built for teams that run on AI

audiences.agenciesDesc: Deploy AI agents that handle support, sales, and operations. Pick a model, connect a channel, go live in minutes.
audiences.freelancersDesc: Run all your AI agents from one dashboard. Multi-channel deployment included. Scale your operations as your business grows.
audiences.saasDesc: Container isolation, GDPR compliance, SSO, and API access. Deploy agents at scale with full control and auditability.

landing.howItWorksTitle: Build or pick a template. Live in 60 seconds.

steps.step1Desc: Tell our AI Builder what you do. It researches your industry and creates a tailored agent — or start from a proven template.
steps.step2Desc: Set the tone, language, and rules. Fine-tune the system prompt or let the Builder handle it.
steps.step3Desc: Scan a QR code for WhatsApp, paste a token for Telegram, or add to Slack. Done.
steps.step4Desc: See conversations in real time. Jump in when needed. Your AI employee gets better every day.

features.builderDesc: Describe your business in plain language. Our AI architect researches your industry and builds a production-ready agent in seconds.
features.byomDesc: Claude, GPT, Gemini, and 20+ more. OpenClaw Business AI included by default — or bring your own keys for full control.
features.multiChannelDesc: WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, iMessage, MS Teams, and more. One agent handles all channels simultaneously.
features.infrastructureDesc: Every agent runs in its own isolated environment. Auto-restart, health monitoring, and encrypted credentials.
features.knowledgeHubDesc: Upload documents, crawl URLs, or paste text. Our RAG engine chunks, embeds, and makes your knowledge searchable by agents and chat.
features.unifiedChatDesc: Chat with any AI model — Claude, GPT, Gemini — powered by your organization's knowledge. No agent deployment needed.
features.securityDesc: AES-256 encryption. Role-based access. European hosting. Built for businesses that care about data privacy.

landing.useCasesSubtitle: Pre-built templates or fully custom. Every agent monitored, measured, and continuously improving.

cases.leadQualDesc: Qualifies leads 24/7. Asks the right questions, enriches with data, routes to sales when ready.
cases.supportDesc: L1 support across all channels. Escalates to humans. Learns from every conversation.
cases.bookingDesc: Books meetings, handles rescheduling, sends reminders. Syncs with any calendar.
cases.salesDesc: Personalized follow-ups across channels. Tracks engagement, notifies reps when leads are warm.
cases.onboardingDesc: Guides new users through setup. Answers questions, completes forms, ensures nothing gets missed.
cases.knowledgeDesc: Your team's AI for HR, IT, and ops. Connects to Notion, Confluence, Slack, or any docs.

landing.pricingTitle: One agent. One price. No surprises.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Pay per user as you grow. Knowledge Hub & OpenClaw Business AI included.

landing.ctaDescription: Hire your first AI employee in under 60 seconds. No API keys. No credit card. Just results.

dashboardPreview.label: THE PLATFORM
dashboardPreview.title: One dashboard. Complete control.
dashboardPreview.description: Monitor every conversation, manage all agents, and track performance in real time. No switching between tools.

0.quote: We replaced 3 support tools with one OpenClaw Business agent. Response time dropped from 4 hours to under 2 minutes. Our customers think they're talking to a real person.
0.name: Sarah Chen

1.quote: The AI Builder understood our insurance business on the first try. We had a fully working lead qualification agent live on WhatsApp within 15 minutes.
1.name: Marcus Weber

2.quote: We handle 3x more inbound leads without hiring. The agent books calls, qualifies prospects, and hands off warm leads to our sales team automatically.
2.name: Priya Sharma

3.quote: The analytics dashboard gives us real insights into what customers are asking. It's helped us improve our product and reduce churn by 18%.
3.name: Lisa Richter

comparator.title: Compare Plans
comparator.subtitle: Find the perfect plan for your team and agents.

faq.title: Your Questions Answered

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: You get 7 days of full access with 1 agent, 1,000 messages, and €5 in AI credits. No credit card required. Upgrade to Professional anytime.

items.q: What channels can I deploy agents to?
items.a: OpenClaw Business supports WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, and more. Each agent can be connected to multiple channels simultaneously.
On the Professional plan, you pay €250 per user per month. Each user gets access to unlimited agents, 5,000 messages per agent, and you can add as many users as you need.
OpenClaw Business supports Claude by Anthropic, with more providers coming soon. You can bring your own API keys or use our included AI credits.
All API keys and sensitive data are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. We use role-based access control, audit logging, and organization-level data isolation.
